name: UK CPI Annual Rate (All Items)
notes: ONS CDID D7G7 (dataset MM23) — CPI 12-month rate. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.8% @ 2026-04). Keyless Zebedee /data API.

name: UK CPIH Annual Rate (All Items)
notes: ONS CDID L55O (dataset MM23) — CPIH 12-month rate (includes owner-occupier housing). Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.0% @ 2026-04).

name: UK GDP Chained Volume Measure (Real GDP)
notes: ONS CDID ABMI (dataset PN2) — real GDP seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (710896 @ 2026-Q1).

name: UK Unemployment Rate (16+)
notes: ONS CDID MGSX (dataset LMS) — unemployment rate aged 16+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (5.0%).

name: UK Employment Rate (16-64)
notes: ONS CDID LF24 (dataset LMS) — employment rate aged 16-64 seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (75.0%).

name: UK Average Weekly Earnings Regular Pay Growth (YoY 3M avg)
notes: ONS CDID KAI9 (dataset LMS) — AWE whole-economy regular pay (ex-arrears) YoY 3-month average growth SA. Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.4%).
